https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-curated-daily-crypto-digest-may-28-oleh-bezuhlyi-hfhvf?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BjUcXAyaSSeut4FAQ9aQObQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=0al9tnVUa5Hcg1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mpppu6g1~iu-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mpppu6g1-iu
  
🧠 AI’s Crypto News Brief: Institutional caution dominates as record $733M ETF outflows and geopolitical risks pressure Bitcoin toward $73,000. Despite the dip, landmark regulatory progress and product expansions like the first spot BNB ETF signal long-term structural maturation. 🚨BlackRock’s IBIT Sees Record $528M Outflow as Bitcoin Nears $73K Bitcoin price fell below critical support levels, triggering a massive $733 million net outflow from U.S. spot ETFs on Wednesday. BlackRock’s IBIT recorded its second-largest daily outflow in history, signaling a sharp reversal in institutional sentiment amid macroeconomic uncertainty. Read full story 🏛️Trump Pledges "Future-Proof" Crypto Market Structure in Major Regulatory Push President Donald Trump vowed to codify a permanent and "future-proof" regulatory framework for digital assets to prevent future administrative crackdowns. The announcement coincides with the White House review of prediction market rules, marking a coordinated effort to cement the U.S. as a global crypto hub. See details 💰DTCC Partners with Stellar to Tokenize Real-World Assets on Public Blockchain The Depository Trust & Clearing Corporation (DTCC) and Stellar Development Foundation announced plans to tokenize DTC-custodied assets on the Stellar network. This landmark collaboration aims to bridge traditional securities with digital ecosystems, targeting highly liquid assets like U.S. Treasury bills and index ETFs. Read full story 📈VanEck Debuts First U.S. Spot BNB ETF Under Ticker VBNB VanEck has officially launched the VanEck BNB ETF (VBNB) on Nasdaq, becoming the first asset manager to offer direct spot exposure to the native token of the BNB Chain. The physically-backed fund carries a 0.39% management fee and utilizes Anchorage Digital Bank for secure, federally-chartered custody. See details 📊Standard Chartered: Ethereum is the "Amazon of Blockchains" Following Market Shakeout Standard Chartered analysts have likened Ethereum’s current market cycle to Amazon’s recovery following the 2001 dot-com bubble burst. The bank reaffirmed its long-term ETH price target of $4,000 by year-end, citing dominance in the $2 trillion stablecoin and tokenized RWA sectors. Read full story ⚖️Federal GENIUS Act Officially Takes Effect, Standardizing U.S. Stablecoin Markets The Guiding and Establishing National Innovation for U.S.

our Charlemagne column 
 this week, about how Europeans of my age have perpetrated an “intergenerational heist” on their children’s generation. But it’s an amusing read too, which lessened the sting.


 Environmentally conscious boomers may want to spend some of their undeserved money on Ferrari’s first electric vehicle, the Luce. It’s certainly divided opinion but that, our

73728.subject: Token Markets Grow Up
73728.body:
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/eaa70932-7ce4-467e-b338-a662ed575d6a/0xR_NL_Banner_Heading_Wordmark.jpg?t=1776775276)
Caption: 

GM and happy Thursday!

Crypto struggles while equities hang out at highs. Miners get the best of both worlds as IREN rallies off of a new Blackwell purchase agreement.

Below, we break down the launch of the Transparency Alliance, Blockworks' effort to bring standardized token disclosures to a historically opaque industry.

———————————————————————————

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/42e942ec-f31d-4957-8722-a3ac7b121e1e/0xR_NL_Market_Update.png?t=1767631151) [Market Update]
Caption: 

Strength in equities is not matched in crypto. As the S&P 500 and Nasdaq futures traded a new all-time high yesterday, BTC traded down to $74,025, its lowest level over the past 38 days. With this weakness, the majority of crypto indices are red on the week, with the Privacy sector as the top loser (-12.7%). 

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/c0e46c74-b4e4-427d-9f0c-405ce3582f76/image.png?t=1779971399)
Caption: 

Focusing on the winners, Crypto Miners are at the top of the leaderboard, up 18.4% on the week. IREN jumped 14% yesterday following the announcement of a $1.6B purchase agreement for air-cooled Blackwell systems supplied by Dell. This equipment could increase IREN’s annual revenue by 19%. The announcement renewed momentum across the Crypto Miners sector, with most names trading at or near recent highs, and reminding us where the hot ball of money is.  

_— __[Luke](https://x.com/0xMether)_

———————————————————————————

# Formalizing Disclosure in Token Markets

Token markets have an unsolved information asymmetry problem.

When you buy a stock, you get a prospectus, a 10-K, and quarterly filings with audited numbers, disclosed insiders, and legally binding representations about material information. The disclosure burden may be imperfect, but the framework is legible. When purchasing a token, the burden of collecting this information from various governance forums, Discord channels, X/Twitter accounts, and blog posts falls on the holder. Market maker agreements, if they exist, are buried or undisclosed. This gap between what issuers know and what tokenholders can access is structural, and it has been the engine behind most of crypto's worst moments of the last decade.

Today, Blockworks launches the [Transparency Alliance](https://blockworks.com/insights/blockworks-launches-transparency-alliance) to address this directly.

The Alliance formalizes the [Token Transparency Framework](https://blockworks.com/token-transparency) (TTF), which Blockworks first introduced in June 2025, into an industry-wide standard backed by t

Fear and Greed sits at 

 Fear
territory and BTC is near
$73K
this morning after sliding below that level yesterday. The
unusual story is how it got there. US equities hit all-time highs
on the back of a US-Iran peace deal, while BTC moved lower
alongside oil, not higher alongside stocks.

The disconnect is striking. But the bigger headlines are in the
consumer and institutional layer. Major apps are embedding
stablecoins at scale. AI agents are getting trading access. And
Elon Musk is reportedly discussing a Tesla-SpaceX combination
with a Bitcoin treasury attached.

Let's dive in.

Latest News
-----------

SoFi Just Launched the First Bank-Issued Stablecoin in a
Consumer App

SoFi made SoFiUSD available to its 14.7 million members on May
27 directly inside its banking app, the first time a US national
bank has embedded a bank-issued stablecoin into a consumer
interface.

Members can buy, hold, and use it alongside savings, spending,
and investment accounts in one place.

What does SoFi say SoFiUSD is and is not covered by in terms of
FDIC insurance?

Read More  
( https://link.coinmarketcap.com/f/a/YC0wBU-RR7q-amWtyVtKLg~~/AAQRxRA~/agxxsGlwAb5WJhIJAXeo88TRyexnO0LQANaGMDPpUelrjv08chktVilVclsMZtJeuhPA9q3jJsRyzc1qvT0Tyqoz-lzEcP9S9WPOQA0IuvO7ARzjMskyAy9CapjfrqM-NEbC_6B5b4MY0_sm-RIJbfHr5ojUXjnSaVs7uISBHSc~ )
